3091760.name: Ciggy World
3091760.description:
Ciggy World is a clicker game where you click on a cigarette to earn rewards! In Ciggy World, every click brings you closer to a treasure trove of drops, or butts.

Every 3, you'll receive a special ciggy drop, each one crafted by our Devs or by our chain smoking community on Discord. Join us and become part of the Ciggy World family, where every puff is a step towards something amazing! You know what we say at Ciggy World "one small puff for man, one giant wheez for mankind".

Experience the thrill of Ciggy World, a delightful parody of the classic Ciggy World theme park, brought to you with a twist of nostalgia and a wink to the golden age of big tobacco.

Come, hang out, and let's build a world where every click brings a little more smoke into the world.
3091760.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
